audio_configuration.project_name: Power Game: The Art of Political Intrigue

title_screen.name: Title Screen Theme
title_screen.description: 戏剧性的政治惊悚主题曲
title_screen.prompt_for_generation: Create a dramatic political thriller soundtrack with mysterious tension, cinematic orchestral music with synthesizer elements

gameplay_calm.name: Gameplay Ambient
gameplay_calm.prompt_for_generation: Ambient electronic music with subtle political atmosphere, calm contemplative mood

gameplay_tense.name: Strategic Tension
gameplay_tense.prompt_for_generation: Tense building electronic orchestral music with suspenseful atmosphere, political intrigue mood

crisis.name: Crisis Alert
crisis.prompt_for_generation: Urgent dramatic crisis music with warning tones, high tension alert atmosphere

victory.name: Victory Fanfare
victory.prompt_for_generation: Triumphant victorious orchestral fanfare with choir, epic political victory mood

defeat.name: Defeat Theme
defeat.prompt_for_generation: Melancholic somber piano with strings, political defeat atmosphere

menu_select.name: Menu Selection
menu_select.prompt_for_generation: Soft selection sound for menu navigation

notification.name: Notification Alert
notification.prompt_for_generation: Subtle notification chime with political theme

decision_made.name: Critical Decision
decision_made.prompt_for_generation: Dramatic decision sound with political weight

alliance_formed.name: Alliance Formed
alliance_formed.prompt_for_generation: Positive diplomatic sound with orchestral elements

crisis_alert.name: Crisis Alert
crisis_alert.prompt_for_generation: Urgent crisis alarm with dramatic tension

chen_weiming.name: 陈伟明语音
chen_weiming.prompt_for_tts: Voice actor for 62-year-old conservative politician, authoritative, calculating tone

sarah_jenkins.name: 莎拉·詹金斯语音
sarah_jenkins.prompt_for_tts: Voice actress for 45-year-old liberal reformer, intelligent passionate tone

commander_fire.name: 火焰指挥官语音
commander_fire.prompt_for_tts: Voice actor for 40-year-old revolutionary leader, intense passionate tone

integration_notes: 所有音频文件应放在 Content/Audio/ 目录下
背景音乐使用 SDL_mixer Music 模块播放
音效使用 SDL_mixer Chunk 模块播放
语音使用 TTS API 生成或手动录制
遵循主权情报设计系统的紧张氛围
